channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Tests confirm a season-ending knee injury for 49ers receiver Brandon Aiyuk
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers star receiver Brandon Aiyuk will miss the rest of the season after tearing ligaments in his right knee.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 49ers WR Brandon Aiyuk to miss season with knee injury
item.description: (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers wide receiver Brandon Aiyuk will miss the remainder of the 2024 season after suffering a knee injury in the 49ers' loss to the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday. Head coach Kyle Shanahan reported that he tore the MCL and ACL in his right knee.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Deshaun Watson's season is ended by a ruptured Achilles tendon, Browns say QB will have surgery
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Deshaun Watson won't finish the season as Cleveland's starting quarterback for the second straight year. He's injured again, and the Browns have new problems.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Russell Wilson throws for 2 TDs, runs for another TD in Pittsburgh debut as Steelers rout Jets 37-15
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Russell Wilson sat at the podium, uniform still on, in no rush to move on from a moment he believed would always come. Even as the weeks passed and his aching calf struggled to get better. Even as Justin Fields deftly guided the Pittsburgh Steelers in his place.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: AP Top 25: Oregon is No. 1 for first time since 2012; Vanderbilt enters poll and Michigan drops out
item.description: Oregon became the fourth team this season to hold the No. 1 ranking in The Associated Press college football poll, moving into the top spot on Sunday for the first time in 12 years after Texas lost at home to Georgia. Vanderbilt made its first appearance since the 2013 season, at No.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs stay undefeated, beat 49ers 28-18 in Super Bowl rematch
item.description: The formula might look a bit different with the defense and running game carrying the Kansas City Chiefs. But the results are awfully familiar as the two-time defending champions keep knocking off teams — especially the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake legend reflects on his journey, leadership, and life beyond the pitch
item.description: Real Salt Lake legend and current Vancouver Whitecaps FC standout Damir Kreilach joins Royal Riot co-host Mattey Casey for an exclusive interview, just ahead of his much-anticipated return to America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: BYU wins last second thriller over Oklahoma State, 38-35
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The dream season for BYU continues. Jake Retzlaff threw a 35-yard touchdown pass to Darius Lassiter with 10 seconds left and No. 13 BYU remained undefeated, outlasting Oklahoma State 38-35 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 2 Oregon routs Purdue 35-0, remains on top of Big Ten with first road shutout in over 30 years
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. (AP) — Oregon coach Dan Lanning challenged his team to see how it would respond to a long road trip on a short week following its 32-31 victory over then-No. 2 Ohio State last week. The No. 2 Ducks aced that test Friday night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: These Dick's Sporting Goods stores will sell championship gear after closing hours if the Dodgers win on Friday
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers can punch their tickets to the World Series on Friday night, and Southern California fans itching to get their hands on some championship merchandise can do so quickly.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Former NFL quarterback Jay Cutler arrested on DUI, gun charges
item.description: The former Bears and Broncos quarterback Jwas arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, Fox 5

item.title: Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler arrested for DUI, gun charge
item.description: FRANKLIN, Tenn. — Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler was arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated. Officers responded to the 200 block of Bridge Street at around 5 p.m. in Franklin, Tennessee on the report of a minor traffic collision involving two vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, ABC 4

item.title: Grand Junction football cruises to third straight league win
item.description: Entering Thursday with their best start (6-1) since 2011, Grand Junction welcomed 4A I-25 league foe Centaurus.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: South Florida Athletics named a 'Best College Athletic Department' by Front Office Sports
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - University of South Florida Athletics has been named one of Front Office Sports’ “Best College Athletic Departments” for 2024.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Denver Broncos at New Orleans Saints: TV channel, time, what to know
item.description: The Denver Broncos face the New Orleans Saints on the road for Thursday Night Football; an anticipated match against coach Sean Payton's former team.
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Donnell, ABC 4

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Montrose volleyball picks up huge league win over Fruita
item.description: It took all five sets to decide a battle between two of the Southwestern League's best on the volleyball court.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: You can design L.A.’s official World Cup 2026 poster: Here’s how
item.description: Calling all Los Angeles County residents (over the age of 18) with artistic skills! The Los Angeles World Cup 2026 Host Committee announced Tuesday that they are searching for local artists and designers to be part of a “once-in-a-generation opportunity” to create the official regional poster for t
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Jets acquire wide receiver Davante Adams from Raiders, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cam Rising out for the season with lower leg injury
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising's return to the field lasted all of one game. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham announced on Monday that Rising is out for the season after suffering a lower leg injury on the first series in Friday's 27-19 loss at Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU hopes to finish strong after 6-0 start
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - From being picked 13th in the Big 12 Conference, to be ranked 13th in the nation, BYU is off to a 6-0 start for just the sixth time in school history without any superstars or sure-fire NFL prospects. In fact, 16 different players have scored touchdowns this year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
